sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53890" key="katade/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταδέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53890.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cross-beam, tie</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:141:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">141.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
